text.death_rewind.config.title: Death Rewind
text.death_rewind.config.rewind_duration: How far back the player rewinds after death.
text.death_rewind.config.checkpoint_inte: How often a new checkpoint is created.
text.death_rewind.config.max_rewinds.too: Only applies in hardcore worlds. 0 means unlimited.
text.death_rewind.config.enable_block_re: Restore changed blocks near the player during rewind.
text.death_rewind.config.optimization_mo: Recommended when C2ME or similar optimization mods are installed. When C2ME is detected, block rewind is disabled automatically to avoid occasional block placement issues. To force-enable it, disable this option and then enable Block Rewind again.
text.death_rewind.config.chunk_radius.to: How many chunks around the player are tracked.
text.death_rewind.config.max_blocks_per_: Higher values restore faster but may cause lag.
text.death_rewind.config.enable_client_e: Show rewind particles and screen effects.
text.death_rewind.config.checkpoint_noti: Show an action-bar message when checkpoints are saved.
text.death_rewind.c2me_block_rewind_disa: [Death Rewind] C2ME detected: block rewind with C2ME is not officially supported, so block tracking has been disabled automatically. To force-enable it, disable 'Optimization Mod Compatibility' in the config and then enable 'Block Rewind' again.
text.death_rewind.c2me_detected: [Death Rewind] C2ME detected: block rewind with C2ME is not officially supported. If block placement or rewind issues appear, enable 'Optimization Mod Compatibility' in the config.
text.death_rewind.cmd.player_only: This command can only be used by players.
text.death_rewind.server_rejected: [Death Rewind] This mod currently only supports single player and cannot be installed on dedicated or multiplayer servers. Please remove this mod.
